name: Rochester Country Club
about: Rochester Country Club is a traditional golf club in Rochester, New Hampshire, that combines a classic course experience with modern indoor golf simulator technology. The facility features an 18-hole championship course, a well-stocked pro shop, and on-site dining at SK's Greenside Grill, making it a comprehensive destination for both on-course and off-course golf activities. With a variety of membership options available and a focus on accommodating golfers from juniors to seniors, the club provides a welcoming environment for both casual play and serious practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulators available for year-round play
Variety of membership levels to suit different budgets and skill levels
On-site restaurant and banquet facilities for post-game dining and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service available at SK's Greenside Grill
On-site bar and restaurant with alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand and model not specified on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside alcohol is not permitted according to the dress code and policies. The on-site restaurant, SK's Greenside Grill, offers food and drink options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole simulator session. Contact the club directly for more information.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club offers junior memberships and programs, indicating it is family-friendly and welcomes youth golfers.
